text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has already reached its
midpoint. Buena Vista's training has been
progressing well, but…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaahhh!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hah… hah… one more set… please…!
choice_data_list: No. We're taking a break first.
No. We're taking a break first.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: No! I want to keep training more! Please…!
choice_data_list: Absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Uh…
………Okay.

Her emotions are leaning too far forward,
and she immediately pushes herself too hard.
At this point, it's clear. Leaving things as they
are would be dangerous.
choice_data_list: …Hey, Buena.
…Hey, Buena.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes.
choice_data_list: How about we go to Hokkaido right now?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Okay…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ehhhhhhhhh—!?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Buena, Trainer!
Welcome to Hokkaido♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: W-We actually came…!

We asked if we could stay with Special Week
for the first few days of her trip home. And
thankfully, she happily agreed.
choice_data_list: Thanks for helping us out, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Not at all. I'm happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Being able to show Buena my precious
hometown like this makes me really, really
happy♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Eh…?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I mean, Buena… you look up to someone like
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: …So I think of you as a very special junior.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So for the next few days, I want you to enjoy
Hokkaido to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Spe… Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…But is this really okay? Skipping training
just to have fun…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
While we're doing this, all my rivals are getting
stronger… and by the time the Shuka Sho
comes…
choice_data_list: Buena. …Trust my judgment on this.
Buena. …Trust my judgment on this.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
choice_data_list: You're tensing yourself up too much.
You're tensing yourself up too much.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Huh? R-Really…?
choice_data_list: Take a look at your palms.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Ah. The marks from my nails…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Could it be, that bubbling feeling in my
chest too…?
choice_data_list: Yeah. So let's let all of that go for now.

text_block_list.text:
Among the girls of her generation, Buena
Vista's ability stands far above the rest.
Even against senior-class runners, I truly
believe she can win.

And because of that, what she needs now is
to fully bring out the abilities she already has.
To do that, the thing that needs restoring is
her emotional balance.
choice_data_list: This time, your training is to have fun.
This time, your training is to have fun.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ugh… But…
choice_data_list: You don't like my training plan?
You don't like my training plan?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Geez! That's not fair when you put it like
that.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You two, the train's almost here～!
Let's go!
choice_data_list: Yeah! …Come on, Buena!
Yeah! …Come on, Buena!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: O-Okay…!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ta-da! First stop… Sapporo. And when you
think of horsegirls, you've gotta think of
Sapporo Racecourse, right?♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Racecourse…
Race…
choice_data_list: (This is bad!) O-Oh, rightttt!!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wah!? Trainer?
choice_data_list: You never raced in Sapporo, right, Spe?
You never raced in Sapporo, right, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Nope, I didn't! So honestly, this stop is mostly
because I wanted to come…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but don't worry! I did plenty of research
beforehand! Apparently there's a beautiful
terrace up above!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…! …A beautiful terrace…
…I wonder if you can see far from there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I bet you can see all the way past the
ocean! Let's eat soft serve there too♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…The view from the terrace was absolutely
beautiful…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You could see all the way out to the distant
mountains… It really cleared my head.
…And what's this place?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Apparently this zoo lets you see the animals
in habitats that feel close to nature! I'm sure
there'll be some wonderful sights waiting for
us♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I heard their melon soft serve is really
delicious too…! Let's go try it!
choice_data_list: Didn't we just have soft serve earlier!?
Didn't we just have soft serve earlier!?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Spe, wait up!
I'll have the same thing too!

Thanks to Special Week, Buena Vista's heart
gradually… but surely… began to relax.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So, about what we should do next…
I actually couldn't decide～!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There's a mountain stream nearby, but
apparently it's a pretty long walk to get there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking maybe we could stay around
here instead and do a little food tour♪
choice_data_list: (She's still planning to eat more…!?)
(She's still planning to eat more…!?)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hmm… What do you want to do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Go on the food tour.
Walk to the mountain stream.

text_block_list.text:
Sapporo brings together all kinds of Hokkaido
cuisine. Maybe relaxing while eating well would
be good for restoring her energy too.
choice_data_list: Let's eat to our hearts' content!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now that's the spirit!
Trainer, let's give it our all♪
choice_data_list: Me too!?
Me too!?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When you think of Sapporo, you've gotta
start with miso ramen, right?♪
Ehehe, I can't wait～

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And after that, jingisukan, zangi, soup curry…
Well, for half a day, that should about cover
it♪
choice_data_list: (…Y-You've gotta be kidding me…)
(…Y-You've gotta be kidding me…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Hey, there's no way we can eat that much, right?
You don't have to force yourself.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Let's split things between the three of us so we can try
lots of different foods instead!
choice_data_list: Buena… thank you…!

text_block_list.text:
And so, our lively little trip through Hokkaido
continued for a few more days…

Compared to Honshu, Hokkaido summers
aren't nearly as humid. In this kind of weather,
walking long distances shouldn't be too hard.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Alright then, let's give it our best!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow… It's so cool here…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I think I might actually forget it's supposed
to be summer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, this place is so relaxing… I feel like
I could forget absolutely everything…

text_block_list.name: Spe & Buena
text_block_list.text: Meeeeelt…
choice_data_list: You two, come back to reality…!

text_block_list.text:
And so, our lively little trip through Hokkaido
continued for a few more days…

Before we knew it, the final day had arrived.
And as for Buena Vista…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow…!
It's so vast…!
choice_data_list: Feels like the whole view just opened up.
Feels like the whole view just opened up.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Ahh～ what a beautiful view…

It seemed her heart had finally managed to
discharge all that built-up energy. The calm,
gentle Buena Vista had completely returned.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: There are a lot of farms around here, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yep, there are! My family also owns a farm♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That's right…! So this is where Spe comes
from…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Every time I take a deep breath, it feels like
all the air inside me gets replaced.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You really grew up in a wonderful place.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right! That's why before important
races, I always end up wanting to come back
here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The Japan Cup was like that too.
choice_data_list: You mean before that second one…!?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yep! The Japan Cup you two watched.
choice_data_list: You came home before that…?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It was only for a few hours though! But before facing the world… I just had to breathe in my hometown air again.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: People called me The General of Japan. Everyone placed their hopes on me…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And my heart had gotten a little prickly
because of it. But once I looked out at these
calm, peaceful sights…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…the prickly feeling in your heart just melts
away completely.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep. …I hope it can do the same for you too,
Buena.
choice_data_list: …! How did you know about that…?

text_block_list.text:
I never explained the situation to Special Week
in detail. Since she was finally back home,
I didn't want her worrying unnecessarily.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've been through all kinds of races
myself!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I think I understand what it means to take
even just a few days off during a time like this.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Spe…
…I—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's take a deep breath, Buena!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Fill yourself up with the fresh air and beautiful
scenery… and let the wind blow through your
heart!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If you do that, I'm sure you'll feel completely
refreshed again♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…!
Yes!
choice_data_list: (…I'm really glad Spe was here with us.)

text_block_list.text:
Standing shoulder to shoulder as if gently
supporting Buena, Special Week once again
reminded me just how incredible she truly is.
